title: KOSZTY ZWIĄZANE Z WYSTĄPIENIEM GRYPY PTAKÓW (HPAI) NA FERMACH DROBIU W HISZPANII
description: A factsheet analyzing the economic impact of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) outbreaks on Spanish laying hen farms. It quantifies egg production losses, sanitation downtime, and compensation measures while emphasizing biosecurity practices to mitigate infection risks.
